title: Display a product catalog with categories

source.module: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

topicTags: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

content.problemStatement:
In this practice problem, you have to create a template to display a product catalog with different categories.

### Task
You need to update your code in `catalog_with_categories.html` to display the categories and their products using a nested `'for'` loop. \
When you run the code - you should get the following view on the URL `/catalog-categories/`.
